## 📝 Pull Request Description

### What does this PR do?
A clear and concise description of what this pull request does.

### Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🎨 New design system addition
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update

## 📸 Screenshots/Videos

### Before
[Add screenshots/videos of the current state]

### After
[Add screenshots/videos of the new state]

## ✅ Testing Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this code locally
- [ ] I have tested in multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- [ ] I have tested on mobile devices
- [ ] I have tested responsive design
- [ ] All existing features still work correctly
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Search functionality works
- [ ] Menu navigation works
- [ ] Copy Markdown button works

## 📋 Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## 🎨 Design System Addition (if applicable)

- [ ] Created folder: `design-systems/{system-id}/`
- [ ] Created landing page: `{system-id}-landing.html`
- [ ] Created DESIGN.md with complete tokens
- [ ] Updated `js/systems.js`
- [ ] Landing page is responsive
- [ ] All design tokens are documented
- [ ] Follows brand guidelines

Add any additional notes, context, or information here.
